reviews.review_title: 🧡 The Hardest Thing in VR: NOT MOVING!!
reviews.review_description:
DONT MOVE takes a brilliantly simple idea—don’t move—and turns it into a hilarious, nerve-wracking, and endlessly entertaining VR challenge. You play as a crash test dummy dropped into a series of increasingly wild scenarios, each designed to break your self-control.

Flying axes, creepy ghosts, swarms of spiders, the terror of drowning… the studio clearly had fun finding every instinct-triggering trick in the book. And that’s exactly what makes it so enjoyable.

It’s a perfect pick-up-and-play experience, great for sharing with friends or introducing newcomers to VR. Watching someone try not to flinch when chaos unfolds around them is half the fun.

Simple concept, clever execution, and tons of laughs. 🚫🕺

I love the game The game is fun but to me it's a little too short some stuff I seen in a trailer I didn't see in the game like that  like the giant dummy that comes from the ceiling what happened to that one I will look forward to that one overall is a great game please add more scenarios and if you can add the be haptics vest to it it'll be even more better Great experience need more scenarios.

You have to be too careful about breathing. I have adhd so I like to move a little. There’s no option for easy mode like I’ve seen on YouTube
